name: Balatacilar Balatacilik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Balatacilar Balatacilik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells friction materials in Turkey. The company's products include brake blocks and pads for heavy vehicles, trucks, and trailers applications; brake linings for light commercial vehicles; clutches; fiber based clutch facings; and industrial friction materials for various applications. It sells its products under the ERKA, Besyildiz, SAFETEX, and FiveStar brands. The company also exports its products to Algeria, Tunisia, Egypt, Iran, Iraq, Syria, Jordan, Macedonia, Kazakhstan, New Guinea, and Portugal. Balatacilar Balatacilik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1988 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.
